name: agentforce-mobile-sdk-android
description: Integrate the Agentforce Mobile SDK into an Android app. Walks consumers through use-case discovery, picks the right auth flow (employee OAuth/JWT vs public service agent vs guest), adds the Salesforce Maven repos and SDK dependencies, and scaffolds Kotlin files for the credential provider, AgentforceClient holder, Logger/Network/Navigation, UI delegate, and a Compose chat host.
